verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing the official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Current page title is [GHOUL UPDATE] Sailor Piece. The description says to join the community server for more exclusive reward codes, but it does not expose the live code strings.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Discord and Trello guide
sources.notes: Updated May 5, 2026. Maps the official Discord and Trello, says the Discord has #game-announcements, #update-logs, and #codes-list, and says the Trello information column lists all active Sailor Piece codes.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Lists 9 active codes after the Ghoul Update, moves the previous 10-code set to inactive, and says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Adds the new Ghoul Update codes, provides the exact reward bundles used in codes.json, and says codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel. It still keeps the older 10-code set in its active list, so it is also a conflict source for expirations.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Matches the 9-code active set, marks the three restart-bug codes as new-servers only, and explicitly moves the prior 10-code set into the expired list.

decisions.reason: Pro Game Guides and Destructoid both list it active on May 19, 2026, and Beebom provides the matching restart compensation bundle. Pro Game Guides and Destructoid both mark it new-servers only.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom updated May 19 still lists it active, while Pro Game Guides and Destructoid updated May 19 both move it out of the live set.
source_conflicts.next_step: Restore only if the official Discord or Trello shows it back in the live list, or if a second strong current source joins Beebom.
